\tzpentry{ID3601}{Quantum State Evolution Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3601 introduces Quantum State Evolution Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \frac{d\Psi}{dt} = \{\Psi, \mathcal{H}\}_{\text{Poisson}} \end{equation}
